mapper.select:
SELECT popup_oid , popup_ttl , popup_type , popup_cn , popup_img_file_path , popup_url_addr , popup_bgng_dt , popup_end_dt , pstn_x , pstn_y , size_w , size_h , open_yn , use_yn , reg_id , reg_dt , mdfcn_id , mdfcn_dt , CASE WHEN popup_bgng_dt > CURDATE() THEN '대기' WHEN CURDATE() >= popup_bgng_dt AND (popup_end_dt IS NULL OR popup_end_dt >= CURDATE()) AND open_yn = 'Y' THEN '게재' WHEN CURDATE() > popup_end_dt THEN '게재종료' ELSE '' END AS open_state FROM ${schema}.popup
AND ( popup_oid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR popup_ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND popup_bgng_dt > CURDATE()
AND popup_bgng_dt <= CURDATE() AND (popup_end_dt IS NULL OR popup_end_dt >= CURDATE())
AND popup_end_dt < CURDATE()
AND (popup_end_dt IS NULL OR popup_end_dt >= #{popupBgngDt})
AND popup_bgng_dt < DATE_ADD(#{popupEndDt}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY popup_oid DESC

SELECT a.popup_oid , a.popup_ttl , a.popup_type , a.popup_cn , a.popup_img_file_path , a.popup_url_addr , a.popup_bgng_dt , a.popup_end_dt , a.pstn_x , a.pstn_y , a.size_w , a.size_h , a.open_yn , a.use_yn , a.reg_id , a.reg_dt , a.mdfcn_id , a.mdfcn_dt , b.file_oid , b.tbl_nm , b.tbl_oid , b.orgnl_file_nm , b.strg_file_nm , b.strg_file_path , b.strg_file_cpct , b.file_type_nm , b.file_type , b.atch_file_seq , b.use_yn AS file_use_yn , b.reg_id AS file_reg_user_id , b.reg_dt AS file_reg_dt , b.mdfcn_id AS file_upd_user_id , b.mdfcn_dt AS file_upd_dt FROM ${schema}.popup a LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file b ON b.tbl_nm = 'popup' AND b.tbl_oid = a.popup_oid AND b.file_type = 'ATTACHMENT' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.popup_oid = #{popupOid} ORDER BY b.atch_file_seq ASC, b.reg_dt DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.popup
popup_ttl = #{popupTtl},
popup_type = #{popupType},
popup_cn = #{popupCn},
popup_img_file_path = #{popupImgFilePath},
popup_url_addr = #{popupUrlAddr},
popup_bgng_dt = #{popupBgngDt},
pstn_x = #{pstnX},
pstn_y = #{pstnY},
size_w = #{sizeW},
size_h = #{sizeH},
open_yn = #{openYn},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId},
mdfcn_dt = NOW(), popup_end_dt = #{popupEndDt}, use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE popup_oid = #{popupOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.popup SET use_yn = 'N' , mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId} , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE popup_oid IN
#{popupOid}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.popup_oid AS popupOid, p.popup_ttl AS popupTtl, p.popup_type AS popupType, p.popup_bgng_dt AS popupBgngDt, p.popup_end_dt AS popupEndDt, CASE WHEN p.popup_bgng_dt > NOW() THEN '대기' WHEN NOW() >= p.popup_bgng_dt AND (p.popup_end_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_end_dt >= NOW()) AND p.open_yn = 'Y' THEN '게재' WHEN NOW() > p.popup_end_dt THEN '게재종료' ELSE '' END AS openState FROM ${schema}.popup p
p.use_yn = 'Y'
AND ( p.popup_oid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.popup_ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND p.popup_bgng_dt > NOW()
AND p.popup_bgng_dt <= NOW() AND (p.popup_end_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_end_dt >= NOW()) AND p.open_yn = 'Y'
AND p.popup_end_dt < NOW()
AND (p.popup_end_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_end_dt >= #{popupBgngDt})
AND p.popup_bgng_dt <= #{popupEndDt}
ORDER BY p.popup_oid DESC
